title: Mr. 3 Watches Little Garden
description: On pages 1–4, mr. 3 watches little garden as mr. 3 and his partners move into position as the giants’ duel and the Straw Hats’ journey become part of a trap.
scene: Mr. 3 Watches Little Garden. Mr. 3 and his partners move into position as the giants’ duel and the Straw Hats’ journey become part of a trap. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Feels like Nami just called out my name...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: The hell is this... Can you even eat this thing?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I'm asking you if you have any rum.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 3 watches little garden. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
